description_long: This is a medium-sized city bus with a predominantly green roof and upper section, and a white lower body accented by a thin black stripe running horizontally along the sides. The bus features large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, angular headlights, and a simple bumper, while the rear is equipped with red tail lights and a similarly shaped window. The wheels are black with simple hubcaps, and the bus sits relatively low to the ground, suggesting easy passenger access. There are no visible route numbers, destination signs, or manufacturer logos on the exterior. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for urban public transportation.
description: A green and white city bus with large side windows, black wheels, and a streamlined, modern design. The bus is low to the ground and features a simple, functional exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wide windshield, angular headlights, and a green roof with a white lower section.
description_view_1: Side view displaying six large rectangular windows, a black stripe, and two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a rectangular window, two red tail lights, and a green roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with six large windows, a black stripe, and two wheels, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on each side, separated by thin vertical pillars, all of similar size and shape.
